productDisplayName: M Tv Men Gold Metallic Sunglasses
description: Style Note sunglasses by MTV. These shades have shatter-proof lenses designed to protect your eyes from glass shards in case of impact. Crafted with a wear-everywhere appeal, the silhouetting and design details in this pair epitomise a downtown, street style cool. Product Details Lens colour: Black Lens type: Fitted with shatter-proof polycarbonate lenses that filter out 100% UVA and UVB rays Frame colour: Golden Frame type: Stylised metal frame in a classic design with a rectangular lens for absolute comfort and durability High bridge and flexible nose pads This set of glasses comes in a sturdy fibre case with felt lining for easy and delicate storage. Warranty: 1 year Material and Care Metal Remove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with the cloth provided Remove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleaner Do not use your fingers on such stains Do not place glasses on uneven surface or heated areas like the dashboard of a car Size Lens width: 6.3 cm
